hooks.command: if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then active=$(tmux display-message -p '#{window_active}#{pane_active}' 2>/dev/null); [ "$active" = "11" ] && exit 0; else frontmost=$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to get name of first application process whose frontmost is true' 2>/dev/null | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); echo "$frontmost" | grep -qi ghostty && exit 0; fi; osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
